event_uuid.description: The UUID (`id`) of the specific event within the trace to parse.

name.description: Short human-readable name for the recipe, shown in the parser editor.

trace_id.description: The `$ai_trace_id` of the trace containing the event to parse.

yaml_source.description: The recipe as raw YAML. Call `llma-parser-recipe-reference` first for the DSL syntax and worked examples. The server compiles and validates this against the exact event before saving.
